runtime_effect: Documents accepted source scope for future ETL hardening; active ETL behavior is unchanged in Stage B1.

energy_hourly_report_v1.description: Canonical hourly energy workbook contract used for the machine-hour backbone.

csi_monthly_xlsx_v1.description: Initial-scope CSI monthly xlsx workbook contract.

csi_monthly_xls_variant_v1.description: Extended-scope CSI xls workbook variant; reader availability remains dependency-gated.

maintenance_transaction_v1.description: Maintenance transaction export contract for evidence and recency context.

energy_daily_report_v1.description: Daily energy remains supplementary and outside the hourly canonical backbone.

energy_tariff_aggregate_v1.description: Tariff aggregate energy remains separate from hourly operational energy.

notes: Initial accepted raw source package for January 2025 through June 2025 canonical rebuild paths.
Folder names are relative to the repository root and do not require absolute local paths.
Extended accepted raw source package for July 2025 through February 2026 canonical extension.
Grouped energy workbooks include March 2026 rows, but March 2026 is not accepted canonical runtime scope in this manifest.

supplementary_out_of_scope.note: March 2026 energy rows exist in grouped source files but remain outside accepted canonical runtime scope unless reopened by a later task.
